# Scout Elite

> Video analysis software for youth and minor hockey coaches. Built by parent coaches for teams that can't afford pro-level tools.

Scout Elite helps coaches clip game footage, run focused team video reviews, plan practices with an AI assistant and drill library, build interactive playbooks, and generate AI-written player and game reports. The companion mobile app (Scout Elite Live) lets coaches tag events live at the rink; those tags are used to auto-generate clips from uploaded game video after the game. Players and parents can view everything shared by their coach for free.

## Try the app

- [Try Scout Elite Free (no signup required)](https://xpress.scout-elite.com/try): Load a real game review in your browser in under a minute. No account or credit card needed.
- [Create an account](https://xpress.scout-elite.com/account/register): Start a 14-day free trial. Coaches start at $4.99/mo.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://scout-elite.com/): Product overview, features summary, and pricing.
- [How It Works](https://scout-elite.com/how-it-works/): Step-by-step walkthrough of the video analysis workflow.
- [Features Overview](https://scout-elite.com/features/): All features at a glance.
- [AI Reports](https://scout-elite.com/features/ai-reports/): Chat-style AI that turns a few coach sentences into a polished post-game breakdown or personal player development plan. No templates or blank pages.
- [Playbooks](https://scout-elite.com/features/playbooks/): Build structured playbooks combining sport-specific diagrams, embedded video clips, and rich text. Share with your team in one click.
- [Practice Planning](https://scout-elite.com/features/practice-planning/): AI drafts a timed practice plan from your game analysis. Pull from a drill library with real rink diagrams, coaching points, and ratings; print a bench sheet, share it with staff, or run it live from a phone.
- [Video Analysis](https://scout-elite.com/features/video/): Upload game footage, clip key moments, tag by player or situation, add telestration drawings.
- [Scout Elite Live](https://scout-elite.com/scout-elite-live/): Mobile app for live in-game event tracking (goals, penalties, custom notes). Events sync to video sessions for automatic clip creation.
- [Teams](https://scout-elite.com/features/teams/): Create a team, invite your roster and parents, and share any review, playbook, or report with everyone in one click. Role-based access keeps coaches in control.

## Pricing

- **Starter (Free)**: For players and parents. View all clips, reviews, and playbooks shared by their coach. Includes the Scout Elite Live mobile app, a starter playbook, and 3 practice plans with the drill library.
- **Solo ($4.99/mo)**: For individual coaches and analysts. 10 GB video storage, clips, tagging, telestration, reviews, unlimited playbooks, unlimited practice plans and drills, AI game and player reports. 14-day free trial.
- **Pro ($12.99/mo)**: For coaches running a full team. Everything in Solo plus 100 GB storage, team creation and management, full sharing (clips, reviews, playbooks, reports), and AI clip detection from raw game video. 14-day free trial.

## Help & support

- [Knowledge Base](https://scout-elite.com/knowledge-base/): Setup guides and how-to articles.
- [Support](https://scout-elite.com/support/): Contact the Scout Elite team.
